item.title:
ChrisPoole___: Chris Poole @ChrisPoole___ · 1min Listened to Brant Dunshea on Luck, I think he may actively have AI installed.
Believ
item.description:
Chris Poole @ChrisPoole___ · 1min Listened to Brant Dunshea on Luck, I think he may actively have AI installed.
Believe me, I have say through untold corporate waffle but he is league of his own.
Laser focussed, strategic pillars, stakeholders, double down even got a run out
Just needs to work on ‘output’ 15
